title: Negotiate a complex situation
subtitle: Balance your needs, constraints, and the other person’s view.
duolingoBridge: Growth bridges B1 output into B2 preparation through native-style input, longer reasoning, nuance, synthesis, register control, and autonomous correction.
overview: Knowledge point 1: state your constraint without aggression.
Knowledge point 2: propose a realistic compromise.

items.fr: Je comprends votre contrainte et je vois que le calendrier est serré.
items.en: I understand your constraint and I see that the schedule is tight.
items.es: Entiendo su limitación y veo que el calendario es ajustado.

items.fr: De mon côté, ce qui me pose problème, c’est le manque de temps pour vérifier.
items.en: On my side, what causes me a problem is the lack of time to check.
items.es: Por mi parte, lo que me causa problema es la falta de tiempo para verificar.

items.fr: Pourrions-nous envisager une version provisoire demain ?
items.en: Could we consider a draft version tomorrow?

items.fr: Cela permettrait d’avancer sans sacrifier la qualité finale.
items.en: This would make it possible to move forward without sacrificing final quality.
items.es: Esto permitiría avanzar sin sacrificar la calidad final.

items.fr: Ce serait, à mon avis, un compromis acceptable pour tout le monde.
items.en: It would be, in my opinion, an acceptable compromise for everyone.
items.es: Sería, en mi opinión, un compromiso aceptable para todos.
